goal: gad publish CLI command with operator attribution. Subagents spawned via /api/dev/spawn inherit OPERATOR_ID/GAD_AGENT_ID env vars (task 51-03) but had no CLI consumer that actually threaded them as request headers. Provide one so an agent runtime calling `gad publish escape-the-dungeon --species gad --version v7` from inside a spawned shell stamps MANIFEST.publishedBy with the human operator, not the runtime.
